extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each entity. I counted only the Against rows: criminal proceedings are Nil for the Company, Directors, Subsidiaries, Promoters/promoter company and Group Companies (0); statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company, Directors, Subsidiaries, Promoters/promoter company and Group Companies are 36 + 1 + 195 + 13 + 0 = 245; and tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries are 6 + 30 = 36, excluding all By rows and promoter/director tax matters. The quantified litigation amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is taken from their stated row amounts of ₹199.92 million and ₹114.07 million, respectively, totaling ₹313.99 million, or ₹31.399 crore; promoter, director and Group Company amounts are excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹202.28 million as of March 31, 2023, converted to ₹20.228 crore, not a re-sum of line items. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the percentages shown relate to project locations, policies, subsidiaries or other segments/metrics, not customers. The source monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
